```python
# Signed: Gemini + gemini-1.5-pro, 2026-06-22
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
#
# Context: A Python utility function to convert text into a URL-safe slug.
#
# Confidence: 1.0 - Standard regex-based slugification implementation.
# Open: Handling of non-ASCII characters (e.g., accented characters, Cyrillic, Hanzi) which currently get stripped rather than transliterated.

def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
```
